title: CCreate Modpack
description:
An integrated package based on mechanical power.
一个基于机械动力的整合包
body:
# CCreate Modpack
This is a Create as the main integration package, suitable for multiplayer games, more gameplay, you can experience the subsidiary mod of Create, increase interest in Create,You can take risks, survive, and Create machines that belong to Create,Even experience the combination of CC: Tweaked and Create.

这是一个以机械动力为主的整合包，旧版本可以在[Hong_SZ.CN](https://modrinth.com/modpack/hongsz.cn/)整合包下载，适合多人游戏，玩法比较多，可以体验机械动力的附属mod，体验机械动力的趣味，你可以在其中冒险，生存，创造出关于Create的机器，甚至体验到来自CC: Tweaked与Create结合的乐趣
